main.description: One time-stamped sample of Dame's physical + ambient state (heart rate, activity, battery, ambient sound, calories), sampled from an iPhone. An append-only log keyed by TID: the LATEST record is the live 'right now' the atmosphere-bar vitals panel reads, and the full series is the history. Each record is immutable, so an is.dame.now status can strong-ref the sample captured alongside it (see is.dame.now.stateRef).

heartRate.description: Heart rate in beats per minute.

charging.description: Whether the phone was charging at sample time.

caloriesBurned.description: Active energy burned so far that day, in kilocalories.

capturedAt.description: When the sample was taken on-device. Used for staleness; may differ slightly from createdAt.
